info.title: Enrich Layer API
info.description: Enrich Layer is a data enrichment API that provides structured company profiles, person profiles, job listings, school data, and contact information from professional networks.

get.description: Look up a person using name and company information. Costs 2 credits per successful request.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Location of this user (country, city, or state)

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Title that user is holding at current job

parameters.name: enrich_profile
parameters.description: Set to enrich to include cached profile data (+1 credit)

get.description: Get structured data of a person profile. Costs 1 credit per successful request.

parameters.name: extra
parameters.description: Include gender, birth date, industry, interests

get.description: Retrieve profile pictures from cached people profiles. Costs 0 credits.
Identify specific roles within companies. Costs 3 credits per successful request.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Role of the profile to look up

parameters.name: company_name
parameters.description: Name of the company to search

get.description: Look up a company by name or domain. Costs 2 credits per successful request.

parameters.name: enrich_profile
parameters.description: Enrich with cached profile data (+1 credit)

get.description: Convert a company numeric ID to its vanity ID. Costs 0 credits.
Get structured data of a company profile. Costs 1 credit per successful request.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL of the company profile to crawl

get.description: Retrieve profile pictures from cached company profiles. Costs 0 credits.
Get the employee count for a company. Costs 1 credit per successful request.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL of the company profile to target

parameters.name: at_date
parameters.description: Fetch employee count at a particular date (YYYY-MM-DD)

get.description: Get a list of employees from a company profile. Costs 3 credits per employee returned.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL of the company profile to target

parameters.name: enrich_profiles
parameters.description: Full profile retrieval (+1 credit per employee)

parameters.name: boolean_role_search
parameters.description: Filter employees by title using boolean expression

get.description: Search for employees at a company by keyword. Costs 10 credits per successful request.

parameters.name: company_profile_url
parameters.description: Profile URL of the target company

parameters.name: keyword_boolean
parameters.description: Job title keyword in Boolean Search Syntax

parameters.name: enrich_profiles
parameters.description: Return full profiles (+1 credit per profile)

parameters.name: resolve_numeric_id
parameters.description: Enable numerical company ID support (+2 credits)

get.description: Search for companies by various criteria. Costs 3 credits per company URL returned.
Search for people by various criteria. Costs 3 credits per profile URL returned.
Check whether an email address belongs to a disposable email service. Costs 0 credits.
Extract personal contact numbers from a profile. Costs 1 credit per number returned.

parameters.name: profile_url
parameters.description: Profile URL to extract contact numbers from

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Max results per call (0 = no limit)

get.description: Extract personal email addresses from a profile. Costs 1 credit per email returned.

parameters.name: profile_url
parameters.description: Profile URL to extract emails from

get.description: Identify social media profiles from a phone number. Costs 3 credits per successful request.
Identify a person's profile from an email address. Costs 3 credits per successful request.
Extract a verified work email address from a profile. Costs 3 credits per successful request.

parameters.name: callback_url
parameters.description: Webhook URL to notify when processing completes

200.description: Successful work email lookup (may be queued)

get.description: Get structured data of a job listing. Costs 2 credits per successful request.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL of a job profile to target

get.description: Search for job listings. Costs 2 credits per successful request.

parameters.name: search_id
parameters.description: Company search ID from Company Profile API

get.description: Get the count of job listings. Costs 2 credits per successful request.
Get structured data of a school profile. Costs 1 credit per successful request.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL of the school profile to crawl

get.description: Get a list of students from a school profile. Costs 3 credits per student returned.

parameters.name: school_url
parameters.description: URL of the school profile to target

parameters.name: enrich_profiles
parameters.description: Full profile retrieval (+1 credit per student)

get.description: Get the current available credit balance. Costs 0 credits.

tmp_profile_pic_url.description: Temporary URL for the profile picture

tags.name: People
tags.description: Person lookup, profile, and role endpoints

tags.name: Companies
tags.description: Company lookup, profile, and employee endpoints

tags.name: Jobs
tags.description: Job profiles, search, and listing counts
